atomic_library.description: Actuate a mechanism to open it (door, cabinet, drawer, appliance door).
Actuate a mechanism to close it (door, cabinet, drawer, appliance door).
Approach, grasp, and lift an object.
pre_conditions: [obj_id] is at rest and not grasped

atomic_library.description: Lower and release a held object onto or into a target location/object. Supports optional orientation parameter for specific placement requirements.
post_conditions: Object is released at target location with specified orientation

atomic_library.description: Compare the size of two objects to determine relative dimensions for stacking or ordering purposes.
pre_conditions: Both objects are within reach and visible to the sensor system.
post_conditions: Returns a comparison result indicating which object is larger.

atomic_library.description: Turn on a stove burner to heat cooking elements.
pre_conditions: Burner is powered and in a ready state.

atomic_library.description: Turn on a microwave to heat contents inside it.
pre_conditions: Microwave is powered and in a ready state.

atomic_library.description: Turn on a water faucet to dispense water into a sink or container.
pre_conditions: Faucet is powered and in a ready state.
post_conditions: Water is flowing from the faucet.

atomic_library.description: Apply force to move an object or part of an object in a specific direction without lifting it.
pre_conditions: Object is stationary and within reach.
post_conditions: Object is moved in the specified direction.
